title: Add studio names to Locations section

requirements.text: Update the Location component to display named studio entries: 'Studio Belvedere' as the name for Prinz Eugen Straße 48/1-2, 1040 Vienna, Austria; 'Clinicus Natura' as the name for Rua do Raio nº26, Braga, Portugal; and 'Off location, travel and via Zoom may be available upon request' as a third unlabelled entry (no studio name). Each named entry should display the studio name prominently above its address.

quotes:
Studio Belvedere
Prinz Eugen Straße 48/ 1-2, 1040 Vienna, Austria

Clinicus Natura
Rua do Raio nº26, Braga, Portugal
Off location, travel and via Zoom may be available upon request

acceptanceCriteria: The first location entry displays 'Studio Belvedere' as a name/title above 'Prinz Eugen Straße 48/1-2, 1040 Vienna, Austria'.
The second location entry displays 'Clinicus Natura' as a name/title above 'Rua do Raio nº26, Braga, Portugal'.
The third entry displays 'Off location, travel and via Zoom may be available upon request' without a studio name prefix.
No other addresses or location references appear in the component.

constraints: Do not alter any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Only frontend/src/components/Location.tsx needs to be modified.
nonGoals: Adding new backend logic or data persistence for location data.
Changing any other section of the page.
Modifying the studio image or layout beyond the text content update.
